Client tracker preview for Conqueror Basketball League

This page shows how the embedded screenshots fit together as a working Notion setup for Conqueror Basketball League: One place for every CBL team — registration, Gold/Silver/Bronze/Rec division, venue assignment, coach confirmation, and matching-shirt color — without rekeying into TourneyMachine or the contact-form inbox.

What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

Register Your Team for the Fall 2026 Conqueror League 5v5 Season, Divisions for K thru 8th Grade Boys & Girls Teams, Teams must wear matching color shirts. No jersey numbers are required, $525 Per Team. Each Team Receives 8 Total Games

Season ops snapshot Registration + roster board Team record Registration + volunteer view Season calendar + tryout window Season closeout + re-enrollment view Setup map

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • One row per team — division tier (Gold/Silver/Bronze/Rec), shirt color logged, coach confirmed
  • TourneyMachine event ID tracked on the team record so Summer 3v3 and Fall 5v5 stay separate
  • Visible admin queue across CBL + Elkhorn Attack + Elite + flag football — same board, four brand lanes
